scripts.start: node -e "const s=process.env.RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME||'';if(s.includes('marketing')){require('child_process').execSync('cd apps/marketing && npm start')}else if(s.includes('web')){require('child_process').execSync('cd apps/web && npm start')}else{require('child_process').execSync('cd apps/api && bun run src/index.ts')}"
